title: Run a leakage audit before training
description: A checklist pass over features for temporal and target leakage so an inflated offline metric is caught early.
body: Use before trusting any offline metric from a freshly assembled training set. Do not celebrate a sudden metric jump — it is more often leakage than genuine signal. Actions: trace each feature's timing relative to the label, confirm point-in-time joins, drop post-outcome and target-derived fields, and re-evaluate on a temporal holdout. Validation signals include a leakage checklist with each feature's timing recorded and a metric that survives the temporal split. Risk boundary: leaked features create models that fail in production; if a feature's timing cannot be established, deny its use and escalate before training proceeds.
